title: The Small Building 2.0
description: Small selection of building blocks. A massively improved version of the previous iteration. Released almost a year after the original.! How about that?
body:
# MASSIVE IMPROVEMENT SITUATION!!

![Content.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/7HMOnRav/images/341ba637e6f418a7ed8996875bf4037eb7a1d913.png)

**This is correct. The mod I've made almost a year ago is finally getting a sequel.**

**So, why a sequel? Because, SpongeBob.**

**This is literally my magnum opus, yet it wasn't very good looking back. Oh, how it could be improved.! And also, implying by the name, it was incredibly small.**

**This one is still small though, just not as small.**

**This time, I will actually update it. If you'd like to suggest content, then feel free to in the new Discord server.!**

## New features currently are:

- Asphalt Blocks

  - Crafted with 3 Gravel, 1 Sand, 1 Iron Nugget.

-----

- Light Asphalt Blocks

  - Crafted with 2 Gravel, 2 Sand, 1 Iron Nugget.

-----

- Oak Crate

  - (Just oak, but I might add more later.)

  - Crafted with 4 Planks, 4 Sticks, 1 Sign.

-----

- Thick Iron Blocks

  - Crafted with 2 Iron Blocks

-----

- Thick Silver Blocks

  - Crafted with 3 Iron Ingots

-----

- Metal Garage Door

  - (Not an actual functional door.)

  - Crafted with 1 Thick Iron Pillar.

-----

- Metal Folding Chair

  - Crafted with 2 Iron Bars, 2 Iron Nuggets, 2 Iron Ingots.

-----

- Andesite, Granite, and Diorite Pillars

  - Crafted with 2 Andesite, Granite, or Diorite Slabs respectively.

-----

- Grass Shrubs

  - Made by stonecutting grass.

-----

- Hilton Leaves

  - Crafted with 8 Leaves, 1 Paper.

-----

- New wood set inspired by the mushroom stem.

  - (Doesn't include doors and trapdoors, but I might add them later.)

  - Crafted with 2 Planks, 2 Mushroom Stems.

-----

- Cement Blocks

  - Smelt or blast Cement Powder.

  - Make Cement Powder by crafting 1 Clay, 1 Sand, 2 Calcite.

  - If you have a mod that adds limestone, Ex: [Alex's Caves](https://modrinth.com/mod/alexs-caves), [[Let's Do] Meadow](https://modrinth.com/mod/lets-do-meadow), then you can instead craft it with 1 Clay, 1 Sand, 1 Limestone.

  - The limestone blocks are in the tag "forge:limestone"

-----

- Gray Cement Blocks

  - Smelt or blast Gray Cement Powder.

  - Make Gray Cement Powder by crafting 1 Clay, 1 Gravel, 2 Calcite.

  - Or 1 Clay, 1 Gravel, 1 Limestone if you have that.

-----

- Convention Carpet

  - Crafted with 1 of any wool carpet, 1 Cyan Dye, 1 Light Gray Dye.

-----

- Paper Paw Lantern

  - Crafted with 1 Lantern, 2 Black Dye, 4 Paper, 1 wooden fence, 1 Convention Carpet.

-----

- Boxed Tile Blocks

  - Crafted with 8 Stone, 1 Coal.
